LanguageData.VEE_AnimalPodCrashDesc: A transport pod carrying a {PAWN_kind} called {PAWN_nameDef} is crashing nearby. If it survives the crash, it will be badly wounded.\n\nIf you tend to its wounds, it may decide to stick around.
LanguageData.VEE_AnimalPodCrashDesc_AceptedJoining: The animal you rescued is joining the colony
LanguageData.VEE_AnimalPodCrashDesc_RefusedJoining: The animal you rescued isn't joining the colony
LanguageData.VEE_TraitorDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} has revealed {PAWN_possessive} true colors!\n\n{PAWN_pronoun} was an agent of {Hostile_FactionName} sent to infiltrate your colony. {PAWN_pronoun} has violently turned against you and is now attacking your settlement from the inside. You can subdue or kill {PAWN_objective}!
LanguageData.SpaceBattle:
A massive orbital ship from {0} has suffered a catastrophic structural failure in orbit directly above your region!

For the next several hours, massive chunks of hull, volatile engine components, cargo bays, and escape pods will rain down across the area.

Keep your colonists under roofs or carefully dodge the falling debris. Once the shower ends, there will be a lot of resources to salvage, and likely survivors to rescue from the wreckage.
LanguageData.ShuttleCrash:
A heavily damaged shuttle is plummeting from the sky and will violently crash nearby.

The impact will scatter chemfuel and ignite a dangerous fire.

Cargo and passengers will be found among the wreckage.

You must act quickly if you want to rescue the survivors, salvage the cargo, and stop the fire from spreading out of control.
LanguageData.EarthquakeDesc: A magnitude {0} earthquake has struck the region!\n\nThe violent shaking has ruptured the ground and caused severe structural damage near the epicenter. Repairs may be required.
LanguageData.CPW: You have detected a cargo pod landing nearby!\n\nIt seems to have carried some weapon, which you can retrieve from the wreckage.
LanguageData.CPA: You have detected a cluster of cargo pods landing nearby!\n\nThey seem to contain random apparel, which you can retrieve from the wreckage.
LanguageData.CAWI:
A small group of {0} has wandered into the area from the wilderness.

They appear to be the remnants of a lost or destroyed merchant caravan, as they are burdened with packs full of trading goods.

You can attempt to tame the animals to claim them and their cargo safely, or you can hunt them down to forcibly take the supplies.
LanguageData.CSLetterContent: A grove of wild {0} has sprouted nearby!\n\nIf you wait for the plants to grow, you'll be able to harvest them.
LanguageData.BAWI:
A small pack of {0} has wandered into the area from the wilderness.

They appear to be accustomed to human presence, and have immediately bonded with the colony. 

Given their natural combat capabilities, they will make excellent defensive pets if you assign a handler to train them. Alternatively, if you cannot afford to feed them, they can be slaughtered for food.
LanguageData.WMWI:
A small tribe of humans living among wild animals has wandered into the area.

They are primitive and hungry, and will actively forage for food, which includes eating your crops or raiding unsecured food stockpiles.

You can attempt to tame them one by one to add them to your colony, arrest them, or deal with them by force if they become too much of a nuisance.
LanguageData.HPDesc: A small hunting party from {0} has entered the area.\n\nThey have come to hunt the local wildlife for meat and leather. They are peaceful and will not attack your colonists, but they may deplete the local game. Once each hunter bags an animal, they will pack up their kills and leave.
